title: Offense
doc_html:
§4876.2. Offense

            A. A person commits an offense if the person maintains a public nuisance described by R.S. 33:4876.1.

            B. An offense under R.S. 33:4876.1 is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine not to exceed two hundred dollars.

            C. The court shall order the abatement and removal of the nuisance upon conviction.

            Acts 2024, No. 718, §3.
doc_text:
§4876.2.  Offense
A.  A person commits an offense if the person maintains a public nuisance
described by R.S. 33:4876.1.
B.  An offense under R.S. 33:4876.1 is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine
not to exceed two hundred dollars.
C.  The court shall order the abatement and removal of the nuisance upon
conviction.
Acts 2024, No. 718, §3.
